title: Self-build and custom housebuilding data
body: "The Self-build and Custom Housebuilding Act 2015 requires each relevant local authority to keep a register of individuals and groups who are seeking to acquire serviced plots of land in the authority’s area for their own self-build and custom housebuilding.  Since 2016, the department has collected information from relevant local authorities in England on self-build and custom housebuilding activity in their areas. This release of data – in the form of management information – provides the figures reported by local authorities for the period 2016 to 2023-24. "
